tasks.label: Publish Docs and Deploy
tasks.command: set -e && echo "[1/5] Building MkDocs" && python -m mkdocs build && echo "[2/5] Staging changes" && git add . && echo "[3/5] Committing if needed" && (git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -m "Update docs") && echo "[4/5] Pushing source branch" && git push && echo "[5/5] Deploying site" && python -m mkdocs gh-deploy --clean
